case_title: BILLIE STOKER VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP

HARRIS--RESIDENT SERVICE COORDINATOR. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,023.00 FILED BY STOKER, BILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOKER, BILLIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
